narrative:
Precinct Clay Township B (precinct in Scioto County) has 578 registered voters, with 62.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.5 percentage points.
